name: ant.dir.gh.sap.fiori-mcp-server
description: MCP server for SAP Fiori development tools. Build and modify SAP Fiori applications with AI assistance.
long_description:
The SAP Fiori MCP server enables AI coding assistants to create and modify SAP Fiori Elements applications. It supports generating apps for CAP and OData services, adding and deleting pages, managing controller extensions, and searching SAP Fiori Elements, UI5, and annotation documentation.

For the best experience, use alongside @cap-js/mcp-server and @ui5/mcp-server.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search SAP Fiori Elements, Annotations, UI5 and Fiori tools documentation

tools.name: list_fiori_apps
tools.description: Scan a directory to find existing SAP Fiori applications

tools.name: list_functionality
tools.description: Get the list of supported functionalities (step 1 of 3)

tools.name: get_functionality_details
tools.description: Get required parameters for a specific functionality (step 2 of 3)

tools.name: execute_functionality
tools.description: Execute a functionality to create or modify a SAP Fiori application (step 3 of 3)

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Controls logging verbosity. Allowed values: off, error, warn, info, debug, verbose.

disable_telemetry.title: Disable telemetry
disable_telemetry.description: Set to true to opt out of SAP Fiori tools usage analytics.
